name: sagnik
objective: Detail-oriented and automation-focused Software Development Engineer in Test (SDET) with 2+ years of experience in designing scalable test frameworks, building internal QA tools, and automating complex workflows. Proven ability to reduce manual effort, improve test coverage, and enhance release quality through innovative automation solutions.
